metadata.hamiltonian: -1/2 Delta_X + 1/2 omega^2 Tr X^2 + g Tr X^4
metadata.sampler: persistent ordered-chamber HMC with lagged reweighting

profile_slices.description: One-dimensional slices of q_i(lambda) through SU(4) traceless eigenvalue space. q_normalized is divided by the deterministic grid adjoint-profile norm for this candidate.

normalization_grid.type: midpoint tensor grid in three traceless coordinates
